song_details.name: Raara Venugopa
song_details.arohanam: S R2 G3 P D2 S
song_details.avarohanam: S N3 D2 P M1 G3 R2 S

pallavi.swara: S-r G-P D-S N-D | P-d-p m-g-r-s r-s-n-d S-- ||
pallavi.sahitya: Raa-raa venu gopa baala | raa-jita sad-guna jaya-shee- la- ||

pallavi.swara: S-r G-P M-g P-D | R-s N-d P-m G-r ||
pallavi.sahitya: Saa-ra saa-ksha ne-ra me-mi | maa-ru baa-ri ko-rva le-raa ||

pallavi.swara: S-r G-G G-- r-g | P-p P-P P- d-p ||
pallavi.sahitya: Nan-da go-paa laa- -ne | nen-du pojaa laa- -nee- ||

pallavi.swara: S-s S-S g-r-s-n n-d-P | p-d-p-m g-g-R g-p-m-g r-s-r-g ||
pallavi.sahitya: Vindu raaraa sadamala madi-to | mudamala raganaa keduruga gadiyara ||

pallavi.swara: p-p-P r-r-R g-p-m-g G- | g-p-m-g m-g-r-s r-g-r-s S- ||
pallavi.sahitya: Palu-maa runugaa ravamuna nin- | pilachina palukavu nalugaku raa- ||

pallavi.swara: r-s-n-d S- m-g-r-g P- | d-p-d-r S- r-s-n-d p-m-g-r ||
pallavi.sahitya: Karivara da-- marimari naa- | adharamu gro- larakani karamuga ||

pallavi.swara: P- m-g-r-g D- m-g-r-g | P- m-g-r-g P-P P- ||
pallavi.sahitya: Raa nagadara raa mu-rahara | raa- bhavahara raave raa- ||

pallavi.swara: G- r-s-n-d R- r-s-n-d | S- r-s-n-d S-S S- ||
pallavi.sahitya: Ee- maguvanu ee lalalanu | ee- sogasini cheko raa ||

pallavi.swara: G-r-s R-R R- R-s-n | D-D D- P-m-g G-G ||
pallavi.sahitya: Korika lim-pon daa- den-damu | neeyan da- cherenu neechen ||

pallavi.swara: G- s-r-g-d P- r-s-r-g | S- g-r-s-n d-p-m-g r-s-r-g ||
pallavi.sahitya: Ta- maruvaku raa- karamula-che | marimari ninu shara-nane dara ||
